ping.title: 📡 Telemetry Response
session.unapproved: This outpost is not yet cleared for operations. Request authorization from the fleet commander {{if .Owner}}<@{{.Owner}}> {{end}}before proceeding.
session.denied: Access denied: your clearance does not authorize /{{.Command}}. Petition a station officer to grant your rank access.
permissions.panel.header:
**Clearance Console** — page {{.Page}}/{{.Pages}}
Assign the roles cleared for each command. Changes take effect at once.
permissions.panel.empty: No commands to govern at this outpost.
settings.panel.header:
**Outpost configuration**
Protocol: **{{.Theme}}** · Comms: **{{.Language}}**
Select a value below; changes take effect at once.
settings.section.forum.label: **Contracts board** — where new contracts are filed for the fleet.
bases.error.no_member: Name the crew member whose outpost this is via the `member` option.
bases.error.bad_base: Select an outpost from the manifest suggestions.
bases.error.bad_equipment: Select an installation from the manifest suggestions.
bases.error.base_not_found: No such outpost on record, or it is outside your command.
bases.error.equipment_not_found: No such installation on that outpost.
bases.register.limit: Outpost quota reached ({{.Limit}}). Decommission one first.
bases.extractor.limit: This outpost already fields the maximum of {{.Limit}} extractors.
bases.production.limit: This outpost already fields the maximum of {{.Limit}} fabricators.
bases.list.title: 🛰️ Outpost Registry
bases.list.empty: No outposts match your survey parameters.
bases.list.expired: This survey has gone stale — run `/base list` to re-scan.
contracts.error.not_in_thread: Issue this order from within a contract dispatch thread.
contracts.error.item_not_found: That commodity is not on the manifest.
contracts.create.failed_forum: Couldn't post the contract — the contracts board is missing. A station officer should re-run `/contract forum`.
contracts.create.failed_perms: Couldn't open the dispatch thread — the bot lacks clearance on the contracts board.
contracts.item.exists: That commodity is already on the manifest.
contracts.reserve.over_cap: That exceeds the contract's outstanding quota for this commodity.
contracts.deliver.over_reserved: You cannot haul in more than you pledged.
contracts.release.below_delivered: You cannot withdraw what has already been hauled in.
contracts.embed.title: 📜 {{.Title}}
contracts.panel.pick_deliver: Choose a commodity to haul in…
contracts.panel.none_reserve: Nothing left to pledge on this contract.
contracts.panel.none_deliver: You have no pledges to haul in here.
contracts.panel.none_release: You have no pledges to withdraw here.
contracts.panel.expired: This manifest pick lapsed — tap the button again.
contracts.notify.closing_soon: 📢 {{.Mentions}} — this contract lapses in {{.Left}}. Haul in what you pledged before the window closes.
contracts.notify.closing_soon_done: 📢 This contract lapses in {{.Left}} — every pledge has been hauled in.
contracts.console.republish_creating: Filing the contract — it'll appear on the board shortly.
contracts.console.bad_deadline: Set the window as whole numbers of days, hours, and minutes (leave all blank for an open-ended contract).
contracts.console.bad_item: Name a commodity and a positive quota.
contracts.console.no_forum: No contracts board is designated. A station officer must set it in `/settings` first.
contracts.console.max_items: The manifest already lists the maximum of {{.Limit}} commodities.
contracts.console.not_found: That contract is no longer on record.
contracts.console.item_not_found: That commodity is not on the manifest.
contracts.console.item_exists: A commodity by that name is already on the manifest.
contracts.console.below_delivered: You cannot void what has already been hauled in.
